name: No Cook Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Karo syrup - light or dark
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the peanut butter and syrup in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Measure the dry milk and confectioners' sugar together and add them to the mixture all at once.
3. Mix everything together first with a spoon, then knead with your hands until the fudge is smooth and creamy.
4. Spread the fudge onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or wax paper.
5. Once set, cut the fudge into squares.
